name: sub-list-custom-css-list-footer
proof: export-proven from the second Approval Form Sub List; identifiers are synthetic
css: selector .dynamic-list .list-footer { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -60px; }
purpose: Preserve when a fixed/footer offset is needed for a horizontally scrollable or fixed-width Dynamic Sub List layout.
validationGuidance: Do not require this CSS for all Dynamic content Sub Lists.
Warn when a .dynamic-list .list-footer rule is present but differs from the studied fixed-footer pattern.
Preserve intentional custom CSS instead of normalizing it away.
